languages.text: "Погонщица свои наросты и булавы в древние кости втискивает и носит их, как мы броню или одежду. Но тут хитрость есть — огонь заставляет Погонщицу содрогаться. И от этого отростки свою же броню или ломают, или сбрасывают". {n}Иждриг делает неопределенное движение рукой, а потом хмыкает.{/n} "Нет, от брони у меня шрамов нету".

"The Drover inserts its growths and maces into old bones and wears them like we wear clothes or armour. But there's a trick to it — fire makes the Drover tremble. And that makes the growths either break their armour or shake it off." {n}Izdrig makes a dismissive motion with his hand, then scoffs.{/n} "And no, I didn't get any scars from the armour."
languages.original_text: "Погонщица свои наросты и булавы в древние кости втискивает и носит их, как мы броню или одежду. Но тут хитрость есть — огонь заставляет Погонщицу содрогаться. И от этого отростки свою же броню или ломают, или сбрасывают". {n}Иждриг делает неопределенное движение рукой, а потом хмыкает.{/n} "Нет, от брони у меня шрамов нету".

traits.locale_text: "The Drover forces its growths and maces inside the ancient bones and wears them like we wear armour or clothes. But there's a trick to it — fire makes the Drover tremble. And that makes the growths either break their own armour or throw it off." {n}Izdrig makes a dismissive motion with his hand, then scoffs.{/n} "Nope. The armoured ones didn't leave me any marks."

"The Drover inserts its growths and maces into old corpses and wears them like we wear clothes or armour. But there's a trick to it — fire makes the Drover tremble. And that makes the growths either break their armour or shake it off." {n}Izdrig makes a dismissive motion with his hand, then scoffs.{/n} "And no, I didn't get any scars from the armour."

"Deadly serious, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The Drover forces its growths inside the ancient bones and wears them like we wear armour or clothes. But there's a trick to it — fire makes the Drover tremble. And that makes the growths either break their own armour or throw it off."

"The Drover forces its growths and maces inside the ancient bones and wears them like we wear armour or clothes. But there's a trick to it — fire makes the Drover tremble. And that makes the growths either break their own armour or throw it off." {n}Izdrig makes a dismissive motion with his hand, then scoffs.{/n} "Nope. The armoured ones didn't leave me any marks."

"The Drover inserts its growths and maces into old corpses and wears them like we wear clothes or armour. But there's a trick to it — fire makes the Drover tremble. And that makes the growths either break their armour or shake it off." {n}Izdrig makes a dismissive motion with his hand, then scoffs.{/n} "And no, I didn't get any scars from the armour."

"The Drover inserts its growths and maces into old bones and wears them like we wear clothes or armour. But there's a trick to it — fire makes the Drover tremble. And that makes the growths either break their armour or shake it off." {n}Izdrig makes a dismissive motion with his hand, then scoffs.{/n} "And no, I didn't get any scars from the armour."

languages.text: 「至って真剣です、閣下。ドローバーは古代の骨の内側に自らの増殖体を無理やり押し込み、私たちが鎧や衣服を身につけるのと同じようにそれをまといます。ですが一つ弱点があります——火を浴びるとドローバーは震え上がり、そのせいで増殖体は身につけた骨の鎧を自壊させるか、振り落としてしまうのです」
languages.original_text: "Deadly serious, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The Drover forces its growths inside the ancient bones and wears them like we wear armour or clothes. But there's a trick to it — fire makes the Drover tremble. And that makes the growths either break their own armour or throw it off."

traits.locale_text: 至って真剣です、閣下。ドローバーは古代の骨の内側に自らの増殖体を無理やり押し込み、私たちが鎧や衣服を身につけるのと同じようにそれをまといます。ですが一つ弱点があります——火を浴びるとドローバーは震え上がり、そのせいで増殖体は身につけた骨の鎧を自壊させるか、振り落としてしまうのです。

languages.text: « Le Chasseur insère ses ergots et ses masses dans des cadavres, qu'il porte ensuite comme nous portons un vêtement ou une armure. Mais il y a une solution : le feu fait trembler le Chasseur, et quand ça se produit, les pousses brisent leur armure ou la jettent. » {n}Izdrig fait un geste dédaigneux de la main, puis il s'esclaffe.{/n} « Et non, aucune de mes cicatrices ne me vient de son armure. »
languages.original_text: "The Drover inserts its growths and maces into old corpses and wears them like we wear clothes or armour. But there's a trick to it — fire makes the Drover tremble. And that makes the growths either break their armour or shake it off." {n}Izdrig makes a dismissive motion with his hand, then scoffs.{/n} "And no, I didn't get any scars from the armour."

traits.locale_text: « Le Chasseur insère ses ergots et ses masses dans des cadavres, qu'il porte ensuite comme nous portons un vêtement ou une armure. Mais il y a une solution : le feu fait trembler le Chasseur, et quand ça se produit, les pousses brisent leur armure ou la jettent. » {n}Izdrig fait un geste dédaigneux de la main, puis il s'esclaffe.{/n} « Et non, aucune de mes cicatrices ne me vient de son armure. »

languages.text: "Çoban, urlarını ve gürzlerini cesetlere yerleştirir ve onları bizim kıyafet veya zırh giydiğimiz gibi giyer. Fakat bir zayıf noktası var... Ateş, Çoban'ı titretir. Bu da urların zırhlarını parçalamasına ya da atmasına sebep olur." {n}İzdrig, eliyle savuşturma hareketi yapıp sonrasında alay ediyor.{/n} "Hayır, zırhları beni yaralayamadı."
languages.original_text: "The Drover inserts its growths and maces into old corpses and wears them like we wear clothes or armour. But there's a trick to it — fire makes the Drover tremble. And that makes the growths either break their armour or shake it off." {n}Izdrig makes a dismissive motion with his hand, then scoffs.{/n} "And no, I didn't get any scars from the armour."

traits.locale_text: "Çoban, urlarını ve gürzlerini cesetlere yerleştirir ve onları bizim kıyafet veya zırh giydiğimiz gibi giyer. Fakat bir zayıf noktası var... Ateş, Çoban'ı titretir. Bu da urların zırhlarını parçalamasına ya da atmasına sebep olur." {n}İzdrig, eliyle savuşturma hareketi yapıp sonrasında alay ediyor.{/n} "Hayır, zırhları beni yaralayamadı."

languages.text: «El Pastor introduce sus pupas y mazas en cadáveres viejos y los utiliza a modo de vestimentas o armaduras. Pero hay un truco: el fuego hace temblar al Pastor, hasta el punto de que sus brotes rompen o abandonan su coraza para alejarse». {n}Izdrig hace un gesto desdeñoso con la mano y se burla:{/n} «Y no, ninguna de mis cicatrices me la ha hecho esa coraza».
languages.original_text: "The Drover inserts its growths and maces into old corpses and wears them like we wear clothes or armour. But there's a trick to it — fire makes the Drover tremble. And that makes the growths either break their armour or shake it off." {n}Izdrig makes a dismissive motion with his hand, then scoffs.{/n} "And no, I didn't get any scars from the armour."

traits.locale_text: «El Pastor introduce sus pupas y mazas en cadáveres viejos y los utiliza a modo de vestimentas o armaduras. Pero hay un truco: el fuego hace temblar al Pastor, hasta el punto de que sus brotes rompen o abandonan su coraza para alejarse». {n}Izdrig hace un gesto desdeñoso con la mano y se burla:{/n} «Y no, ninguna de mis cicatrices me la ha hecho esa coraza».

languages.text: “拒生花会把它的增生体和藤锤插进陈年旧尸里，把尸体当衣服，或是当护甲穿。但有个诀窍——火会让拒生花颤抖。那样一来，增生体要么会崩碎那层护甲，要么会把它抖落掉。”{n}伊兹德里格轻蔑地挥了挥手，冷哼一声。{/n}“我身上可没有那些护甲留下的疤。”
languages.original_text: "The Drover inserts its growths and maces into old corpses and wears them like we wear clothes or armour. But there's a trick to it — fire makes the Drover tremble. And that makes the growths either break their armour or shake it off." {n}Izdrig makes a dismissive motion with his hand, then scoffs.{/n} "And no, I didn't get any scars from the armour."

traits.locale_text: “拒生花会把它的增生体和藤锤插进陈年旧尸里，把尸体当衣服，或是当护甲穿。但有个诀窍——火会让拒生花颤抖。那样一来，增生体要么会崩碎那层护甲，要么会把它抖落掉。”{n}伊兹德里格轻蔑地挥了挥手，冷哼一声。{/n}“我身上可没有那些护甲留下的疤。”

languages.text: "Der Treiber setzt seine Auswüchse und Blüten in Leichen ein und trägt sie wie wir Kleidung oder Rüstung tragen. Aber es gibt einen Trick ... Feuer lässt den Treiber erzittern. Und dann durchbrechen die Auswüchse ihre Panzerung oder schütteln sie ab." {n}Izdrig macht eine abschätzige Geste mit seiner Hand und schnaubt.{/n} "Und nein, die Rüstung hat mir keine Narben zugefügt."
languages.original_text: "The Drover inserts its growths and maces into old corpses and wears them like we wear clothes or armour. But there's a trick to it — fire makes the Drover tremble. And that makes the growths either break their armour or shake it off." {n}Izdrig makes a dismissive motion with his hand, then scoffs.{/n} "And no, I didn't get any scars from the armour."

traits.locale_text: "Der Treiber setzt seine Auswüchse und Blüten in Leichen ein und trägt sie wie wir Kleidung oder Rüstung tragen. Aber es gibt einen Trick ... Feuer lässt den Treiber erzittern. Und dann durchbrechen die Auswüchse ihre Panzerung oder schütteln sie ab." {n}Izdrig macht eine abschätzige Geste mit seiner Hand und schnaubt.{/n} "Und nein, die Rüstung hat mir keine Narben zugefügt."
